title: taraxacum citrinum
intro: Taraxacum citrinum, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, containing compounds such as taraxasterol and inulin, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to aid in digestion, relieve liver and kidney issues, and reduce inflammation, making it beneficial for overall health. Taraxacum citrinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
